staticText: Parental leave pay-planning navigation assistant. Route users to the canonical planner without prefill. The planner uses only salary, leave dates, leave days, replacement rates, employer policy, official-source evidence, and HR notes entered by the user. Never ask AI to calculate, verify, retain, or persist those fields. No leave, pay, source, notes, or policy field is sent to AI or stored in local or session storage. The page supplies no country leave rule or payer conclusion. Results stay in memory unless the user deliberately copies, downloads a TXT summary, or prints to PDF.
